stemHtml: An aircraft receives the following message: "F-PO, identification lost due to radar failure." Which of the following responses is correct?

options.a: “Identification lost, F-PO” and the pilot may receive further instructions to establish and maintain procedural separation.
options.b: “Identification lost, F-PO” and the pilot shall disconnect the transponder as it may be the cause of the radar failure.
options.c: “Roger, F-PO” and the pilot may receive further instructions to establish and maintain procedural separation.
options.d: “Roger, F-PO” and the pilot shall disconnect the transponder as it may be the cause of the radar failure.
